# Review Issues — doc-scan Android App
*Generated by swarm-review on 2026-06-28*

## Status
- [x] Fixed in this session
- [ ] Deferred / needs separate work

---

## Critical

| # | Status | File | Issue |
|---|--------|------|-------|
| C1 | [x] | `EditViewModel.kt` | Undo stack OOM — changed `ArrayDeque<Bitmap>` → `ArrayDeque<ByteArray>` (JPEG-compressed) |
| C2 | [x] | `EditViewModel.kt` | `currentBitmap` not recycled in `onCleared()` — fixed |
| C3 | [x] | `DocumentRepositoryImpl.kt` | Missing `@Transaction` on `createDocument`, `addPage`, `reorderPages`, `deletePage`, `updatePage` — wrapped with `database.withTransaction {}` |
| C4 | [x] | `DocumentViewerViewModel.kt` | TOCTOU race in `deletePage` — fixed with `Mutex` |
| C5 | [x] | `AppContainer.kt` | `cleanExportCache()` in `init` blocks main thread — removed (lifecycle observer handles it) |
| C6 | [ ] | `SaveDocumentUseCaseTest.kt` | Tests crash on JVM (Android stubs). Needs Robolectric or injectable `StorageChecker` |
| C7 | [ ] | `ImageProcessorLogicTest.kt` | Zero production code coverage — all tautologies |
| C8 | [ ] | `PdfGeneratorLogicTest.kt` | Zero production code coverage — pure inline math |
| C9 | [ ] | `DocumentRepositoryImpl.kt` | FK insert-order fix has no regression test |
| C10 | [ ] | `ScannerViewModel.kt` | URI-on-main-thread fix has no test; `onScanCancelled` test body is empty |

## High

| # | Status | File | Issue |
|---|--------|------|-------|
| H1 | [x] | `ScannerViewModel.kt` | `decodeByteArray` without `inSampleSize` on up to 50 pages — 2-pass decode added |
| H2 | [x] | `ThumbnailGenerator.kt` | Full decode for 256 px output — `inSampleSize` added |
| H3 | [x] | `DocumentViewerViewModel.kt` | Gallery import no `inSampleSize` + bypasses `SaveDocumentUseCase` — both fixed |
| H4 | [x] | `ImageStorage.kt` | `loadPageBitmap` no `inSampleSize` — fixed |
| H5 | [x] | `AppContainer.kt` | Raw `context` reference (leak risk) — now stores `applicationContext` |
| H6 | [ ] | `AppNavGraph.kt` / `EditViewModel.kt` | `EditViewModel` injects repository directly (layer violation). Deferred — needs `UpdatePageUseCase` |
| H7 | [ ] | `DeleteDocumentUseCaseTest` | No test file exists |
| H8 | [ ] | `PageReorderTest.kt` | Only exercises `FakeRepo`, not production logic |
| H9 | [ ] | `ScannerFlowTest.kt` | Happy-path assertions silently skipped on constrained CI runners |
